title: install.md: registries.conf setup in containers-image package
body:
No need for separate setup steps

Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>

@rhatdan @vrothberg @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL

RE: https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/4747#issuecomment-579027624 /cc @delight
